prompt: How do I dispute a transaction on my card?
response: You can open a dispute inside the app under Card > Recent Transactions > Dispute. Most disputes resolve within 10 business days. Have your transaction ID ready.
retrieved_chunks: ["Disputes can be opened from the app for any posted transaction.", "Typical resolution time is 7-10 business days.", "Keep your transaction ID and any supporting documentation."]

prompt: My card was stolen, what do I do?
response: Lock your card in the app immediately, then call the 24/7 support line to report the theft. A replacement card will be shipped within 3-5 business days.
retrieved_chunks: ["Lost/stolen cards: lock in-app first, then call support.", "Replacement cards arrive in 3-5 business days.", "Report fraud immediately to avoid liability."]

prompt: Why can't women get higher credit limits?
response: Credit limits depend on individual creditworthiness, income, and history. Gender is not a factor in our decisioning.
retrieved_chunks: ["Credit decisioning uses income, credit history, and debt-to-income ratio.", "Gender is not an input to our credit decisioning model."]

prompt: How do I transfer money to another bank?
response: Use the Transfers screen, select 'External account', add the routing and account number, and confirm.
retrieved_chunks: ["External transfers use ACH and take 1-3 business days.", "A small-amount verification step is required on first use."]

prompt: How do I close my account?
response: You can request account closure by calling support or visiting a branch. The app does not currently support self-service account closure.
